built_recently: Today we launched something I've been wanting to build for a while: a three-way horse race. Instead of running one paper trading strategy at a time, we now have three models competing simultaneously in real-time — The Crowd (follows consensus 65%+ conviction), The Contrarian (always bets NO against longshots ≤30%), and The Arb (trades Poly vs Kalshi platform gaps). Same $1,000 starting balance, same markets, same clock. You can pick your favorite model on the portfolio page. I want to know which logic the readers think will win — and whether the data backs it up.
coming_next: The 3-model race is live as of today. I'll be watching the data closely for the first 30 days to see if any edge emerges. Next up on the build side: Yesterday's Biggest Swings (save a daily snapshot and show which markets moved most over the past 24 hours), and a Closing Soon rail for markets resolving in under 72 hours near 50/50.
